title: Drowning Beacon
description:
Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a [sine]sinking lighthouse[/sine] emitting [purple]anti-light[/purple].

You can bottle up the [aqua][sine]eerily-glowing water[/sine][/aqua] that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the [gold]lens[/gold].
notes: The [gold]Bottle[/gold] option gives you the Glowwater Potion, which when used exhausts your entire hand and draws 10 cards. The [gold]Climb[/gold] option costs 13 Max HP but grants the [gold]Fresnel Lens[/gold] relic, which enchants cards with [gold]Nimble[/gold] (+2 Dexterity) both when obtained and whenever cards are offered as rewards or encountered at merchants.
